description: One production run on a machine within a shift — the sequence unit for shift_comparison (View 4) and the normalization base ('was lief in welcher Reihenfolge'). Reconstructed by a central run-builder from cpp_vault cycle snapshots (op_id) + order-start/tool-change events + machine_events; not edge-sourced. Carries technical_output (Soll-/Standardmenge = ideal cycle time x runtime) used as the volume weight and the planned baseline.

attributes.name: shift
attributes.description: Shift id the run is attributed to (S1/S2/S3)

attributes.name: sequence_index
attributes.description: Position of this run in the shift's sequence

attributes.name: setup_before
attributes.description: True if a changeover/setup preceded this run

attributes.name: technical_output
attributes.description: Soll-/Standardmenge (ideal cycle time x runtime) — volume weight + planned baseline

attributes.name: produced
attributes.description: Good parts produced in the run

relationships.description: Shift the run is attributed to
Next run in the shift sequence (timeline link)
